_source: gin7 manual pp.46-55 via logh7-manual-canon.md §9 (PDF-verified against .omo/work/gin7manual/manual-text.md, manual pages 46-55)
_confidence_notes: Ship-command TIMING table (pp53-55) and ground-battle/occupation/units-damage/death (pp51-52) were cross-checked verbatim against the extracted PDF text (manual-text.md PAGE 51-55) — values exact.

Digest table in §9.11 was truncated and merged some rows; the authoritative list here adds three commands the digest omitted: 空戦命令 (Air-combat, w-key), 陸戦隊撤収 (Retract landing force), 態勢変更 (Posture change).

Several mechanics are explicitly marked '現在未実装 / currently unimplemented' in the manual: material reduction from attacks, fighters (戦闘艇), planet-type landing-force gating, and combat death (戦死). These are flagged in each record.
Cargo-wipe hull threshold (§9.9) is not given a numeric value in the manual ('一定の数' = 'a certain number'); left as null and _uncertain.
Command-range circle radius cap and expansion rate are functions of character/flagship stats, not fixed numbers; expressed as formula descriptions.
Wait = 実行待機時間 (startup delay), Duration = 実行所要時間 (execution time). All seconds unless noted (撤退命令 duration = 2.5 min = 150 s).

tactical_lifecycle.start_condition: A friendly unit and an enemy unit occupy the same strategic grid.
tactical_lifecycle.start_condition_ja: 友軍ユニットと敵ユニットが同一グリッドに存在
tactical_lifecycle.end_condition: No enemy unit remains in the grid.
tactical_lifecycle.end_condition_ja: 敵ユニットが残存しない
tactical_lifecycle.extra_for_body_grids: Planet/fortress grids additionally require full occupation (惑星/要塞は完全占領も必要).
tactical_lifecycle.ko: 전술전 시작=아군·적군 유닛이 같은 그리드 공유. 종료=적 유닛 전멸; 행성/요새 그리드는 완전 점령까지 필요.

unit_taxonomy.note: Plus strategic-management units handled at the strategic layer.

flagship_unit.note: Named flagships (e.g. ヴィルヘルミナ, パトロクロス) or generic flagships derived from warship classes.
flagship_unit.ko: 기함 유닛 = 1척. 고유 기함 또는 함급 파생 일반 기함.

warship_classes.note: Each subdivides into Roman-numeral subtypes (e.g. 戦艦Ⅰ型); detailed stats live in §12 / content/manual/ship-units.json.

command_authority.on_battle_entry: Units of the same 部隊 (corps) are auto-assigned 指揮権 (command authority); commanders share control.
command_authority.transfer_of_command: Requires the target unit to be outside any command-range circle AND fully idle/stopped.
command_authority.ko: 전투 진입 시 동일 부대 유닛 자동 지휘권 배정. 우선순위: 온라인>고계급>평가점>공적점. 지휘권 이양은 대상이 커맨드레인지 밖+완전 정지일 때.

command_range_circle.ja: コマンドレンジサークル
command_range_circle.origin: Flagship unit (targets 艦隊/輸送艦隊/巡察隊/独行艦/地上部隊) or defense HQ (targets garrison).
command_range_circle.bypass: Flagship-self commands and personal commands bypass the circle.
command_range_circle.issuance_constraint: Only same-戦隊 (squadron) units inside the circle may be commanded; low-morale/disordered units cannot be commanded.
command_range_circle.radius_behavior: Resets to 0 on each command issuance, then grows over time to a per-flagship cap.
command_range_circle.lone_ship: 独行艦 (lone ship) has no command-range circle.

startup_delay_range_seconds.note: All commands have a 0-20 s startup delay shown by a remaining-time bar; out-of-range units finish current order then hold.

command_range_circle.ko: 기함(함대/수송함대/순찰대/독행함/지상부대) 또는 방위사령부(수비대)가 발령 기점. 기함자기/개인 커맨드는 서클 무시. 발령마다 0으로 리셋 후 재확대. 확대율=f(지휘), 최대=f(기함성능). 독행함은 서클 없음.

scouting.automatic: Continuous and automatic for all flagships/warships/defense HQ — there is no scout command.
scouting.accuracy: f(distance, target type, unit stat); stationary units get a concentrated-scouting accuracy bonus.

stealth.note: Per-unit stat; stationary units gain an electronic-warfare evasion bonus.

scouting.fog_of_war: Shared across all friendly characters in a battle; on a contested target, any success wins (success OR failure -> success).
scouting.ko: 전 기함/함정/방위사령부 자동·상시 색적(색적 커맨드 없음). 범위=유닛스탯+[SENSOR]. 정밀도=f(거리,표적종류,스탯), 정지 시 집중색적 보너스. 색적회피=유닛스탯, 정지 시 전자전 회피 보너스. 시계는 아군 캐릭터 공유, 경합 표적은 누구든 성공하면 성공.

line_of_fire.note: Beam/gun/missile is blocked by a friendly ship (incl. mobile fortress) or obstructing terrain.

weapons.supply_cost: gun consumes supplies equal to ship's ガン消費 value
consumes supplies equal to ship's ミサイル消費 value

weapons.effect: low attack but slows ship targets / repels enemy fighters

fortress_cannon.behavior: Piercing — auto-hits every unit (friend or foe) along the line of fire; only terrain blocks it.
fortress_cannon.firing: Charge begins once a firing direction is chosen; auto-fires on charge completion.

ship_attack_and_weapons.ko: 사선판정=빔/건/미사일은 아군함(이동요새 포함)·지형에 차단. 빔/건=중근거리, 미사일=장거리. 전투정=10보급 정액(미구현). 요새포=관통, 사선상 적아 전부 자동명중, 지형만 차단.

ground_battle.trigger: Drop a landing-force (陸戦隊) onto a planet/fortress; the ship must be carrying it.
ground_battle.resolution: Resolves in a per-body 地上戦ボックス (ground-battle box).
procedure: Anchor (碇泊) the ship carrying the landing-force above the planet/fortress.
Execute the [陸戦隊出撃] tactical command to drop the landing-force.
If enemy ground units are present, ground battle auto-starts.
ground_battle.ko: 지상전=행성/요새에 육전대 강하(함정 탑재 필수), 거점별 지상전박스에서 해결. 박스 상한=진영당 30(그리드 300 상한에 포함). 방위력 바 100%=30유닛 배치. 절차: 碇泊→[陸戦隊出撃]→적 지상유닛 있으면 자동 개시. 행성타입 게이트는 미구현.

occupation_processing.trigger: Auto-runs when enemy ground units on a planet/fortress reach 0.

effects.ja: 職務権限カードの喪失
effects.detail: Defeated faction loses planet-specific posts (惑星総督/守備隊指揮官/封土 etc.); occupier gains them but they are inert until a character is appointed.
Defeated garrison ground units are immediately treated as annihilated (全滅扱い).
Defeated characters on the body are force-launched with their flagships to an anchored (碇泊) state above it.
Warehouse supplies pass to the occupier; in-build ships, mooring ships, and stored ship units are destroyed.
All facilities on the body pass to the occupier.
A body occupied by the Empire becomes Imperial-House direct domain (帝室直轄領).

occupation_processing.ko: 적 지상유닛 0이면 자동 점령 처리: 직무권한카드 이전(임명 전 비활성)·수비대 전멸 항복·캐릭터 긴급출격 碇泊·창고 접수+건조중/보관 함선 파괴·시설 이전·제국 점령지는 帝室直轄領.

ship_unit.attrition: Hulls removed one at a time on destruction.

cargo.scaling: Carried resources/weapons/supplies decrease in proportion to surviving hull count.
cargo.carried_ground_units: Auto-redistribute to other ships on hull loss, but are wiped if surviving hull count drops below a threshold.
cargo._note: Manual says '一定の数を下回った場合' (below a certain number) without a numeric value.

units_and_damage.ko: 기함=1척 통상/손해, 工作艦 수리, 격파 시 게임에서 제외. 함정유닛=300척, 격파 시 1척씩 감소. 적재물=잔존 척수 비례 감소. 적재 육전대=함선 격파 시 타함 자동이동, 일정 수 이하면 전멸(수치 미명시).

death.model: Whether a character dies is the player's choice.
death.default_on_flagship_destruction: 負傷 (injury) + instant warp to the 帰還惑星 (return planet); the character does not die.
death.return_planet_setting: System Settings -> Game Settings -> Return Planet Setting (帰還惑星設定).
death.ko: 전사는 플레이어 선택. 기함 격파 시 기본=부상+귀환행성으로 즉시 워프(사망 아님). 귀환행성=시스템설정>게임설정>귀환행성설정. 전사는 미구현.

_columns.wait: 実行待機時間 startup delay (s)
_columns.duration: 実行所要時間 execution time (s)

ship_commands_timing._note: Only warship-unit commands within the current command-range circle accept input; some support keyboard shortcuts.

commands.notes: Move the selected flagship/warship unit to a designated position.
Rotate while keeping formation. (Hotkey 's' inferred; manual key glyph dropped in extraction.)
Facing unchanged; moves at 50% of full speed.
180-degree turn in place; turn speed scales with the character's 機動 (mobility) ability.

Short-range warp out of the grid. Requires the unit to be outside the radar-screen circle. Other commands can still be issued during the 2.5-min prep. Applies only to squadron units within the max command-range at execution start; grounded landing-forces stay behind.
Group units into a designated formation; persists until a command breaks it.
Auto-fire on in-range enemies; excludes planets/fortresses.
One-off temporary attack on a designated enemy unit.
Order a warship unit to make a fighter (戦闘艇) attack on a designated enemy; auto-selects 対艦戦 (anti-ship) or 迎撃戦 (interception) by target type.
Drop (when anchored 碇泊) or sortie (when stationed 駐留) carried landing-force onto a planet/fortress. Valid only for ships carrying a landing-force.
Recover (re-embark) landing-force units that were dropped/sortied onto a planet/fortress.
Change the selected warship unit's posture among the 4 postures.

commands.duration_note: 20 s PER UNIT; total = N x 20 s
commands.notes: Sortie flagship/warship units stationed (駐留) on a planet/fortress. Sortie order prioritizes warship units; their type order is random.
Cancels the active ship command and halts all units.

list.detail: Held in a planet/fortress satellite orbit.

planet_fortress_commands.usable_by: Only a character who administers the defense HQ AND is the defense commander (防衛指揮官).
planet_fortress_commands.command_circle_regrowth: Resets to 0 on each issuance; regrowth rate = f(character ability).

commands.notes: Fires the fortress cannon; piercing AoE that can damage friendly units (friendly fire).

planet_fortress_commands.ko: 방위사령부 관할+방위지휘관인 캐릭터만 사용. 발령마다 서클 0 리셋, 재확대율=f(캐릭터 능력).
